If you don't choose, if you don't enable this, so you don't check the box, it will always deviate or guide the person to the same flow that they initially went through. So if you disable this and somebody went into path A, the next time when they come into this specific flow they will go to path A again. Now when you enable random path every time then the scenario could be that somebody comes into path A but at some point they come back to this flow for whatever reason now they see path B or path C or path D, whatever, how many paths you have in there as long as you have it to set it to random.
